title: daucus carota subsp. maritimus
intro: Daucus carota subsp. maritimus, also known as sea carrot or seaside carrot, is a subspecies of the wild carrot plant that is adapted to grow in coastal areas. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Daucus carota subsp. maritimus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Daucus carota subsp. maritimus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
